tutorial.welcomeA11y: Guided tour to get started with the app
tutorial.welcomeBody: In 2 minutes, I'll show you how everything works. We'll do a quick tour of each tool so you're ready to go right away.
tutorial.welcomeStep4: Create your first piece of content
tutorial.welcomeOptOut: I already know Tipote, don't show me this guide again
tutorial.completeHeading: Well done, you know it all!
tutorial.completeBody: You've seen all the tools. Now the most important step: complete your settings so Tipote generates truly personalised content.
tutorial.completeTipDesc: The more you fill in your positioning, branding and settings, the more accurate and convincing your content will be.
tutorial.completeOptOut: Don't show me this guide again
tutorial.nudgeDesc: 2 min to discover each tool and know exactly what to do.
tutorial.tooltipToday: Today — your home page. Every day, find what you need to do here: priority tasks and a summary of your progress.
tutorial.tooltipStrategy: Strategy — your roadmap. Tipote has prepared a custom strategy with actionable tasks. You can adjust everything to your liking.
tutorial.tooltipCreate: Create — this is where the magic happens! Generate posts, emails, articles in a few clicks. This is where you use your AI credits.
tutorial.tooltipContents: My Content — everything you've created is stored here. Check your calendar, schedule publications and track quiz results.
tutorial.tooltipTemplates: Templates — ready-to-use models you can download in one click to your Systeme.io. Use them as much as you want, they're included in your plan!
tutorial.tooltipCredits: AI Credits — your real-time counter. Click it in the top right to see details or recharge if needed.
tutorial.tooltipAnalytics: Analytics — fill in your stats regularly (weekly or monthly) so Tipote can refine your strategy and give you more precise advice.
tutorial.tooltipPepites: Gems — nuggets of advice that appear over time. When you see the red badge, there's something new!
tutorial.tooltipSettingsProfile: Profile — your personal info. If you change projects, you can also reset your Tipote here.
tutorial.tooltipSettingsConnections: Connections — connect your social networks here. If you use Systeme.io, enter your API key to import your leads.
tutorial.tooltipSettingsReglages: Settings — choose your content language and fill in key info about your business. The more complete, the better Tipote understands you!
tutorial.tooltipSettingsPositioning: Positioning — THE most important setting! This is Tipote's copywriting engine. Refine your target, message, and positioning for ultra-personalised content.
tutorial.tooltipSettingsBranding: Branding — add your colours, fonts and logo so generated pages match your brand instantly.
tutorial.tooltipSettingsAi: AI & Credits — track your credit usage and customise the style of auto-comments on your posts.
tutorial.tooltipSettingsPricing: Subscription — manage your plan independently: upgrade, downgrade or cancel from this tab.
tutorial.tooltipCoach: AI Coach — your personal adviser (PRO and ELITE plans). It knows your project and helps you make the right decisions. No more endless courses!
tutorial.tooltipComplete: That's it! You've completed the full tour. Head to settings to personalise Tipote to the max!

upsell.body: Auto-commenting allows Tipote to automatically comment on posts similar to yours to increase your visibility and attract new followers. Comments are AI-generated using your tone and style.

onboarding.title: Welcome to Tipote
onboarding.subtitle: A few questions to build your personalized strategy.

primaryGoal.question: Beyond money, what matters most to you?

businessObjectives.question: What do you want to achieve with your business first?

niche.question: Describe your niche by completing this sentence:
niche.description: Don't stress if it's vague, you can refine it later.
niche.objectivePlaceholder: e.g. launch their first digital product…

clientProfile.question: Tell me about your ideal client.
clientProfile.problemPlaceholder: e.g. they don't know where to start, they lack visibility…
clientProfile.failuresPlaceholder: e.g. too generic, not adapted to their situation…
clientProfile.futureLifeLabel: Their life after achieving their goal
clientProfile.futurePlaceholder: e.g. they finally have time for their family, they live from their activity…

timeAvailable.question: How many hours per week can you dedicate to your business?

biggestBlocker.question: What's your biggest obstacle right now?

contentPreference.question: Which types of content do you prefer creating?

platforms.question: Which platforms are you already on?

businessStatus.question: Where are you with your business?

options.has_offers: I already have offers for sale

hasAlreadySold.question: Have you already made sales (or received commissions)?

satisfiedWithOffers.question: Are you satisfied with your current offers?

options.rethink: I want to rethink them completely

clientTestimonials.question: Share 2-3 client testimonials (what they said or felt).
clientTestimonials.placeholder: e.g. "Thanks to you I finally launched my course!" — Marie

offers.question: What are your current offers?
offers.description: Add up to 3 offers with their details.

salesPageUrls.question: Do you have sales pages? Share the links.

monthlyCommissions.question: How many commissions do you receive on average per month?

audienceEmail.question: Do you have an email list?

audienceSocial.question: Do you have a social media audience?

urgentProblem.question: What urgent problem will you solve for your ideal client?
urgentProblem.description: A real problem that stresses them or blocks their progress daily.
urgentProblem.placeholder: E.g.: They can't find their first clients despite months of effort...

quickResult.question: What quick, visible and motivating result can you promise?
quickResult.description: A result that creates a "wow" effect within the first 7 days.
quickResult.placeholder: E.g.: Getting their first 3 qualified meetings in 7 days...

topObstacles.question: What are the 3 biggest obstacles preventing your client from getting this result?
topObstacles.description: The concrete blockers holding them back today.
topObstacles.placeholder:
E.g.: 1) They don't know how to position themselves
2) They're afraid to sell
3) They have no acquisition system...

uniqueMethods.question: What are your unique or innovative methods to help them?
uniqueMethods.description: What sets you apart: your secret method, your framework, your unique approach.
uniqueMethods.placeholder: E.g.: My 3-step method to create an irresistible offer without an audience...

offerFormat.question: In which format(s) do you want to offer your products?
offerFormat.description: Choose one or more formats that suit you.

uniqueness.question: Why is your offer unique and different from everything else?
uniqueness.description: What makes it an obvious choice for your client.
uniqueness.placeholder: E.g.: Because I combine X and Y in a way nobody else does...

refusals.question: Is there anything you absolutely refuse to do?
refusals.description: I won't include any of this in your strategy.

options.no_personal_branding: No personal branding (don't want to show myself)

nicheArea.question: What field will you build your business in?
nicheArea.description: Choose the field closest to your project.

automations.title: Automations

hero.title: Social Automations — ManyChat Style
hero.description: Detect keywords in comments and automatically send a personalized DM on Instagram and Facebook. Capture emails, send free resources — on autopilot.

automations.xNote: X/Twitter: DM API requires a Pro plan at $5,000/month — not viable. Threads: DM API is not yet available for developers.

setup.title: Setup required — Missing Supabase table
setup.description: Copy this SQL and run it in the Supabase SQL editor to create the automations table.
setup.instructions: Supabase → SQL Editor → New Query → Paste → Run

guide.title: How to activate your automations
guide.intro: Follow these 4 simple steps so your followers receive an automatic DM whenever they comment a keyword on your posts.

step1.title: Connect your Meta account
step1.desc: Go to Settings → Connections and connect your professional Instagram and/or Facebook account (Page or Creator Account).

step2.title: Check messaging access
step2.desc: From your Instagram account or Facebook Page, make sure DMs and messages are enabled in your privacy settings.

step3.title: Create your automation here
step3.desc: Choose a trigger keyword (e.g. PDF, GUIDE, PROMO) and write the message your followers will automatically receive in their DMs.

step4.title: Test with a comment
step4.desc: Post something on Instagram or Facebook, comment with your keyword and check that you receive the automatic DM within seconds.

rgpd.title: GDPR compliance — what we do
rgpd.description: The user initiates contact by commenting → implicit consent. Every DM automatically includes 'Reply STOP to unsubscribe'. Meta's 24h window naturally limits unsolicited messages.

empty.title: No automations yet
empty.description: Create your first automation to automatically reply to comments on Instagram and Facebook.

dm.title: Auto DM on Comment
dm.description: Post 'Comment PDF to get your free guide'. When someone comments 'PDF', they automatically receive your link via DM.
dm.example: Post: 'Comment PDF 👇' → Comment 'PDF awesome' → Auto DM with the link
dm.defaultMessage:
Hey {{firstname}}! Thanks for your comment 🙌 Here's your free guide: [YOUR_LINK]

Reply STOP to unsubscribe.

email.title: Auto Email on Comment
email.description: The user comments a keyword, receives a DM asking for their email, then gets the guide delivered to their inbox via systeme.io.
email.example: Comment 'GUIDE' → DM 'Send me your email' → Email sent → Added to systeme.io
email.defaultMessage:
Hey {{firstname}}! To receive your free guide, reply to this message with your email 👇

Reply STOP to unsubscribe.
email.defaultEmailDm: Got it! I'm sending your guide to {{email}} within the next few minutes. Check your spam folder if you don't see it 📬

form.name: Automation name
form.type_comment_to_dm_desc: Send a DM with a link or message
form.type_comment_to_email_desc: Capture the email and send to systeme.io
form.keywordHint: Case-insensitive — any comment containing this word will trigger the automation.
form.dmMessagePlaceholder:
Hey {{firstname}}! Here's your guide: [link]

Reply STOP to unsubscribe.
form.dmMessageHint: Use {{firstname}} to personalize. STOP will be added automatically if you forget.
form.emailCaptureHint: After the first DM, the bot waits for a reply with the email and sends it to systeme.io
form.emailDmMessage: DM message to request the email
form.emailDmPlaceholder: Reply to this message with your email to receive your guide 📧
form.systemeioTagHint: This tag will be assigned to the contact in systeme.io to trigger your email automations.
form.rgpdNote: Every DM will automatically include a STOP mention. The user initiated contact by commenting — this is the implicit consent compliant with GDPR and Meta policies.
form.targetPostPickError: Make sure your account is connected in Settings.
form.targetPostPickEmpty: No posts found. Make sure you have published posts on this account.
form.targetPostHint: Select the post on which you want to activate this automation.
form.commentRepliesPlaceholder:
It's in your DMs!
Let me know if you received it 👌
Check your private messages
Great, sending it in 2 min ✉️
Check your DMs!
form.commentRepliesHint: One variant per line. A random reply will be posted as a comment before sending the DM.
form.tiktokCommentRepliesPlaceholder:
Thanks for your comment! ...
Great, thanks for participating!
Happy to hear that! ...
Nice one, appreciate it!
Thanks for sharing your thoughts!
form.tiktokCommentRepliesHint: One variant per line. A random reply will be posted in response to the comment.
form.tiktokNote: TikTok doesn't provide a DM API. The automation will reply directly in a comment under the target post.

errors.tableNotReady: The Supabase table doesn't exist yet. Follow the setup guide above.

autoCommentPanel.title: Auto-comments
autoCommentPanel.descriptionEnabled: Automatically comment on similar posts to boost your visibility
autoCommentPanel.descriptionLocked: Upgrade to Pro or Elite to unlock this feature

createClient.generationTimeout: Generation started but no content was retrieved (timeout). Check your Contents.

leads.title: My Leads
leads.encryptionBadge: Your data is end-to-end encrypted (AES-256). Neither Tipote nor any third party can read your leads' information.

widgets.title: Widgets
widgets.subtitle: Social proof notifications and share buttons for your pages.
widgets.emptyDesc: Create social proof notifications or share buttons for your pages.
widgets.customMessagesHelp: Add promo, urgency, or scarcity messages. E.g.: "Sale ends March 15", "Only 3 spots left"
widgets.embedCodesHelp: Copy these codes and paste them into your Systeme.io page settings or your website HTML.
widgets.signupPixelHelp: Paste this code on the page shown after a free signup (lead magnet, quiz, etc.)
widgets.purchasePixelHelp: Paste this code on the confirmation page after a payment.
widgets.noEventsYet: No events recorded yet. Events will appear here when the pixel fires.
widgets.toastSectionDesc: Social proof to boost your conversions

share.sectionDesc: Share buttons for your pages and content
share.platformsHelp: Select which networks to display on your share buttons.
share.shareTextPlaceholder: E.g.: Check out this amazing page!
share.shareTextHelp: If empty, the page title will be used.
share.embedHelp: Copy this code and paste it into your Systeme.io page or your website HTML.
